结节病.summary: 日本研究发现，心肌活检阳性心脏结节病患者死亡率更高，且与左心室射血分数降低和心肌炎症标志物相关。

结节病.title: Coexistence of sarcoidosis and spondyloarthritis: a rare but intriguing association.
结节病.authors: Alunno A, Carubbi F, De Escalante B, Policarpo G, Retamozo S, Garcia Morillo JS, Robles A, Atzeni F, Ballano J, Gomez de la Torre R, Lopez Dupla JM, Ramos-Casals M, Brito-Zeron P
结节病.summary: 结节病与脊柱关节炎共存罕见但具有显著临床关联，HLA-B27阳性率在不同发病顺序亚组中差异明显。

结节病.title: Chest radiographic findings suggestive of possible sarcoidosis in patients with nephrolithiasis.
结节病.authors: Azizzade Dobakhshari M, Alavi Foumani A, Jafari A, Falahatkar S, Maroufizadeh S, Tangestani Nejad A, Asghar A, Mousavi F, Javaheri NZ
结节病.summary: 肾结石患者中，胸部X线提示结节病的表现可能被低估，需引起临床警惕。

结节病.title: Targeting CXCR6 suppresses granuloma formation and pulmonary fibrosis through inhibiting Th17 responses in sarcoidosis.
结节病.authors: Han Y, Liu M, Xu W, Li Z, Jiang D, Geng J, Gao S, Li S, Xie B, Zhu L, Zhang H, Costabel U, Dai H, Wang C
结节病.summary: 靶向CXCR6通过抑制Th17反应减轻结节病肉芽肿形成和肺纤维化。

结节病.title: Tilmanocept Labels Granulomas in Cardiac Sarcoidosis.
结节病.authors: Pyle CJ, Weirnick R, Elganainy M, Fernandez JR, Tobin DM, Karra R
结节病.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Distinct plasma proteome in severe pulmonary hypertension associated with chronic lung disease.
ILD.authors: Bosacoma A, Garcia AR, Lozano JJ, Sidorova J, Tura-Ceide O, Blanco I, Roger Y, Sardine A, Martin-Ontiyuelo C, Rodriguez-Chiaradia DA, Lopez-Meseguer M, Hernandez-Gonzalez F, Ribas J, Pomares X, Santos S, Molina-Molina M, Sellares J, Peinado VI, Barbera JA
ILD.summary: 严重慢性肺病合并肺动脉高压患者血浆中表现出独特的蛋白质组学特征。

ILD.title: Artificial intelligence and radiomics in drug-induced interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Marchi G, Fanni SC, Mercier M, Cefalo J, Salerni C, Ferioli M, Candoli P, Romei C, Gori L, Cucchiara F, Cenerini G, Guglielmi G, Pistelli F, Carrozzi L, Mondoni M
ILD.summary: 人工智能和影像组学通过提取CT等影像的量化特征，有助于早期识别药物性间质性肺病并区分病变类型。

ILD.title: Clinical features, pathogenesis, and treatment of anti-MDA5 antibody-positive interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Yamaguchi K
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5抗体阳性间质性肺病进展快、预后差，三联疗法可改善结局。

ILD.title: Nintedanib combined with dual immunosuppression for interstitial lung disease in systemic sclerosis and rheumatoid arthritis: A systematic review and pooled multicentre real-world cohort study.
ILD.authors: Chioni A, Campochiaro C, Keret S, Panopoulos S, Baresic M, Varelas G, Radic M, Sebastiani M, Tektonidou MG, Sfikakis PP, Rimar D, Matucci-Cerinic M, Daoussis D
ILD.summary: 尼达尼布联合双免疫抑制治疗系统性硬化症和类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病，可稳定肺功能并改善皮肤评分。

ILD.title: Human lung gammadelta T cells maintain functionality during inflammatory lung disease.
ILD.authors: Taber A, Frutoso M, Potchen N, Koehne AL, Schmitz C, Morrell ED, Prlic M, Wright SW
ILD.summary: 人类肺部γδT细胞在炎症性肺病中仍能维持其抗感染和组织修复功能。

ILD.title: Prognostic significance of 1-year pulmonary function changes in inflammatory myopathy-related interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Keret S, Laverde SM, Silva RL, Choudhuri I, Gkiaouraki E, Chandra T, Pongtarakulpanit N, Bhowmick N, Kothari V, Reddy KS, Alhassan E, Aggarwal A, Almackenzie M, Sullivan DI, Faghihi-Kashani S, Yamaguchi K, Kass D, Gibson K, Ascherman DP, Moghadam-Kia S, Oddis CV, Aggarwal R
ILD.summary: 一年内肺功能下降（FVC降低≥5%）显著增加炎症性肌病相关间质性肺病患者的10年死亡率。

ILD.title: A framework for translational research in interstitial lung disease (ILD) using bronchoalveolar lavage (bal).
ILD.authors: Mawer CMA, Stanel SC, Ward EM, Smith DJF, Hull RC, Mehta P
ILD.summary: 支气管肺泡灌洗液标准化多组学分析框架可提高间质性肺病转化研究价值。

ILD.title: Assessment of sleep quality and sleep disordered breathing in patients with interstitial lung diseases.
ILD.authors: Thomas ED, Venkatnarayan K, Veluthat C, Selvam S, Ramachandran P, Devaraj U, Krishnaswamy UM
ILD.summary: 间质性肺病患者普遍存在睡眠质量差(75%)和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停(71%)，但仅睡眠质量与生活质量下降相关。

ILD.title: Yield and safety of different biopsy types in interstitial lung disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
ILD.authors: Mor E, Belmonte LA, Degrassi M, Marinescu DC, Ryerson CJ
ILD.summary: 经支气管冷冻活检在间质性肺病中诊断率高，安全性优于外科肺活检。

ILD.title: The potential role of neutrophils in connective tissue disease-associated interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Wang H, Lu Y, Liu J, Sang Z, Fan W, Liu Y, Lin J
ILD.summary: 中性粒细胞通过形成NETs和免疫调节在结缔组织病相关间质性肺病发生发展中起关键作用。

ILD.title: Hospitalization risk in patients with rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease or bronchiectasis: A matched cohort study.
ILD.authors: Zhang Q, Qi Y, Wang X, McDermott GC, Chang SH, Chaballa M, Khaychuk V, Paudel ML, Liao KP, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病或支气管扩张患者住院风险显著升高，尤其是呼吸系统住院风险增加5倍。

ILD.title: Validation of screening criteria for interstitial lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis in routine clinical practice: the VAR-EPIDSER study.
ILD.authors: Mena-Vazquez N, Dominguez-Alvaro M, Bonilla Hernan MG, Atienza-Mateo B, Fernandez Velilla Pena M, Pinilla Fernandez I, Ortiz AM, Park HS, Gomez NP, Plasencia-Rodriguez C, Aguilar Hurtado MC, Holgado Perez S, Serrano-Combarro A, Vegas-Revenga N, Bernal Vidal JA, Lacasa-Molina J, Burger S, Campos Fernandez C, Fiter Areste J, Meraz Ostiz JA, Munoz Gomez MDM, Alvaredo D, Castaneda S
ILD.summary: AR-EPIDSER标准筛查类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病敏感度低，漏诊率近30%，医院中未诊断或亚临床ILD患病率为13%。

ILD.title: Optimal glucocorticoid tapering in anti-synthetase syndrome-associated interstitial lung disease: A multicentre MYKO cohort study.
ILD.authors: Miyake H, Kotani T, Suzuka T, Matsuda S, Oe K, Yamamoto M, Akiyama C, Seno T, Kida T, Sagawa T, Inoue H, Kitai J, Shimada Y, Hirobe K, Yoshida K, Ogawa A, Nakakubo Y, Nakayama Y, Nohda Y, Sasai T, Tsuji H, Nakashima R
ILD.summary: 抗合成酶综合征相关间质性肺病患者的糖皮质激素减量目标为每日≤15mg泼尼松当量。

ILD.title: Trends and outcomes of lung transplant listings for connective tissue disease-associated interstitial lung disease (CTD-ILD): A 20-Year analysis from the organ procurement and transplantation network database.
ILD.authors: Bhandari S, Bhandari S, Byers DE, Witt C, Huecker J, Sen D
ILD.summary: 2003-2023年间，结缔组织病相关间质性肺病肺移植等待名单增加四倍，硬皮病最常见，移植结局各异。

ILD.title: Target trial emulation of biologic and targeted synthetic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs for rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: McDermott GC, Solomon DH, Sparks JA, Desai RJ
ILD.summary: 该研究未发现类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病中不同b/tsDMARD药物与利妥昔单抗相比存在显著疗效差异。

ILD.title: Time-of-day radiotherapy alters radiation pneumonitis risk but not survival in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Yu J, Chen D
ILD.summary: 放疗时间影响间质性肺病肺癌患者的放射性肺炎风险，但未改变总生存率。

ILD.title: CT features of interstitial lung disease in systemic lupus erythematosus and overlap lupus-other connective tissue disease.
ILD.authors: Sajust de Bergues de Escalup A, Mageau A, Deneuville L, Sacre K, Khalil A, Costedoat-Chalumeau N, Hachulla E, Uzunhan Y, Le Tallec E, Cadranel J, Marchand-Adam S, Montani D, Reynaud-Gaubert M, Prevot G, Beltramo G, Crestani B, Cottin V, Borie R, Debray MP

ILD.title: Interstitial Lung Disease in Patients With Unresectable Stage III NSCLC Treated With Chemoradiotherapy Followed by Durvalumab in Japan: Analysis From the Multicenter Prospective AYAME Study.

ILD.summary: 日本研究显示，化放疗后durvalumab治疗III期NSCLC，75%患者出现间质性肺病，多发生于44天内。

ILD.title: Mechanisms of Surfactant Maturation in Development and Disease.
ILD.authors: Pranty AI, Cuevas Ocana S, Dickens JA
ILD.summary: 肺表面活性物质成熟异常可导致从新生儿呼吸衰竭到成人间质性肺病的多种疾病。
